where n represents the ADC bit number and, as was previously described, if FSR represents
the full scale range, in Volt, of the ADC, then q is the ADC quantization step, equal to one
least significant bit (LSB). Please note that (3.2) simply translates the trans-characteristic of the
uniform quantizer depicted in Fig. 3.3(a) into a mathematical form. From (3.2) we see that q
represents the minimum variation of input signal x that always causes the variation of at least
one bit in the binary code associated to xq, the coded signal. erefore, any variation of signal x
smaller than q is not always able to determine some effect on xq. is simple observation shows us
that the quantization process actually implies the loss of some of the information associated to the
original signal x. It is a common approach to model this effect as an additive noise, superimposed
to the signal. In order to simplify the mathematical characterization of the quantization noise,
a stochastic process is associated to it and assumed to be not correlated to signal x, uniform in
probability density and with a statistical power equal to:  翻译

content: 其中n代表ADC位数，如前所述，如果FSR表示ADC的全幅范围（以伏特表示），则q是ADC量化步长，等于一个最不重要的位（LSB）。请注意，（3.2）简单地将图3.3（a）中均匀量化器的传输特性转换为数学形式。从（3.2）中我们可以看出，q表示输入信号x的最小变化，它总是导致与xq相关联的二进制代码的至少一个位的变化，即编码信号。因此，小于q的信号x的任何变化都不能总是对xq产生某些影响。这个简单的观察告诉我们，量化过程实际上意味着丢失了一些与原始信号x相关的信息。通常的方法是将这种效果建模为添加的噪声，叠加在信号上。为了简化量化噪声的数学特性描述，将一个随机过程与其相关联，假定其与信号x不相关，概率密度均匀，并且具有统计功率：

We will not deepen the statistical modeling of the quantization noise any further. Equa-
tion (3.4) is a very useful tool to estimate the number of bits one needs, in order to get a desired
SNR for a given conversion process. For example, if one needs at least a 50 dB SNR, (3.4) shows
that the number of bits should be higher than 8. Please note that this model does not take into
account any other source of noise besides quantization, like, for example, those associated to the
signal conditioning circuitry or to the power converter. Consequently, the actual signal to noise
ratio will always be lower than what is estimated by using (3.4).

to noise
ratio will always be lower than what is estimated by usin

content: 我们不会进一步深入量化噪声的统计建模。方程（3.4）是一个非常有用的工具，用于估计需要多少位才能获得给定转换过程的期望信噪比。例如，如果需要至少50 dB的信噪比，（3.4）显示位数应该大于8位。请注意，此模型不考虑除量化之外的任何其他噪声源，例如与信号调理电路或电源转换器相关的噪声。因此，实际的信噪比始终低于使用（3.4）进行估计的值。
信噪比（SNR）是指包含在信号中的有用信号能量与噪声能量之间的比率。它通常用分贝（dB）来表示，是评估信号质量的一种常用指标。较高的SNR意味着信号中有更多的有用信息，并且噪声对信号质量的影响较低。

moves.text_span: 信噪比（SNR）是指包含在信号中的有用信号能量与噪声能量之间的比率。它通常用分贝（dB）来表示，是评估信号质量的一种常用指标。较高的SNR意味着信号中有更多的有...

content: 假设有一个音乐信号，在传输或记录过程中可能会受到噪声的干扰。如果音乐信号的能量是10毫瓦，而噪声的能量是1毫瓦，那么信噪比就是10/1=10，或者用分贝表示为20dB。这意味着有用信号的能量是噪声能量的10倍，因此可以说这个信号的质量很好。但是，如果噪声的能量增加到5毫瓦，那么信噪比就会降低到2，或者用分贝表示为3dB，这意味着噪声将会很明显地影响到信号的质量，使其变得难以接受。

moves.text_span: 假设有一个音乐信号，在传输或记录过程中可能会受到噪声的干扰。如果音乐信号的能量是10毫瓦，而噪声的能量是1毫瓦，那么信噪比就是10/1=10，或者用分贝表示为2...

content:
ere are at least two other major forms of quantization that always take place in the imple-
mentation of a digital control algorithm: (i) arithmetic quantization and (ii) output quantization.
As far as the former is concerned, we can say that what we call arithmetic quantization is nothing
but an effect of the finite precision that characterizes the arithmetic and logic unit used to compute
the control algorithm. e finite precision determines the need for truncation (or rounding) of
the controller coefficients’ binary representations, so as to fit them to the number of bits available
to the programmer for variables and constants. In addition, it may determine the need for trun-
cation (or rounding) after multiplications. In general, the effect of coefficient and multiplication
result truncation (or rounding) is a distortion of the controller’s frequency response, i.e., the shift
of the system poles, that can have some impact on the achievable performance. Both truncation
and rounding effects can be modeled again as a type of quantization and so as an equivalent noise,
of arithmetic nature, added to the signal. Although extremely interesting, predicting the amplifi-
cation of arithmetic noise within a closed loop control algorithm by pencil and paper calculations
is a really tough job. To check the control algorithm operation to this level of detail, the only
viable option is its complete, low-level simulation, based on a model that includes the emulation
of the adopted controller arithmetic unit.

moves.text_span:
f quantization that always take place in the imple-
mentation of a

content: 除了最基本的量化之外，在数字控制算法的实现中还会发生另外两种主要的量化形式：（i）算术量化和（ii）输出量化。对于前者，我们可以说，我们所谓的算术量化其实就是由于计算控制算法时使用的算术逻辑单元的有限精度而导致的影响。有限精度决定了需要截断（或舍入）控制器系数的二进制表示，以适应程序员为变量和常量提供的位数。此外，它还可能决定是否需要在乘法之后进行截断（或舍入）。一般来说，系数和乘法结果的截断（或舍入）效应会导致控制器频率响应的失真，即系统极点的偏移，这可能会对可实现的性能产生一定的影响。截断和舍入效应都可以再次建模为一种量化类型，因此可以看作是一个等效的噪声，以算术形式添加到信号中。虽然非常有趣，通过铅笔和纸的计算来预测在闭环控制算法中算术噪声的放大是一项真正困难的工作。要检查控制算法的操作到这个细节级别，唯一可行的选择是进行完整的低级仿真，基于一个包括采用的控制器算术单元的模型。

It should be clear by now that, in case a floating point representation of constants and vari-
ables within a control algorithm were employed, none of the above discussed arithmetic quan-
tization effects could be observed. It is important to say, however, that the use of floating point
processors in the field of digital control industrial applications is relatively rare. Indeed, only high-
end DSPs, designed for high performance real time signal processing, can rely on a floating point
arithmetic unit. e cost of such DSP units, however, goes often beyond the maximum affordable
for the typical industrial control application. erefore, at least for the near future, the industrial
engineer, designing digital regulators for switching converters, will have to face the problems
generated by fixed point arithmetic units. Luckily, the availability of low cost 16- or even 32-bit
microcontrollers and DSPs is very large. e occurrence of severe arithmetic quantization prob-
lems is therefore hardly ever encountered, being confined to extremely demanding applications
or to applications where the use of 8-bit microcontrollers is the only viable option and the emulation of a higher precision arithmetic is out of the question for memory or timing constraints. It is
basically for this reason that we will not take arithmetic quantization into account in the follow-
ing discussion of digital controller implementations. In practice, our results will be determined
assuming an infinite precision arithmetic, considering that to be well approximated by modern,
16-bit microcontrollers and DSPs. 翻译

moves.text_span:
ively rare. Indeed, only high-
end DSPs, designed for high perfo

content: 现在应该清楚了，如果在控制算法中使用浮点表示变量和常量，以上讨论的算术量化效应都是无法观察到的。但是需要指出的是，在数字控制工业应用领域中，使用浮点处理器相对较少。实际上，只有高端的DSP，专为高性能实时信号处理而设计，才可以依赖于浮点算术单元。然而，这样的DSP单元的成本通常超出了典型工业控制应用最大可承受的范围。因此，至少在不久的将来，设计开关转换器数字调节器的工业工程师将不得不面对由定点算术单元产生的问题。幸运的是，低成本的16位甚至32位微控制器和DSP的可用性非常大。因此，严重的算术量化问题几乎不会遇到，通常只出现在极度苛刻的应用中，或者只有在使用8位微控制器是唯一可行的选项且出于内存或时序限制而无法模拟更高精度算术时才出现。基本上，正是出于这个原因，我们在以下数字控制器实现的讨论中不考虑算术量化。实际上，我们的结果将基于无穷精度算术，认为这可以被现代16位微控制器和DSP很好地近似。

Output quantization, instead, is related to the truncation (or rounding) operation inherent
in the digital to analog conversion that brings the control algorithm output variable back from the
digital to the continuous time domain. In our application case, this function is actually inherent in
the digital PWM (DPWM) process. e reduction of the control variable output (in our case the
desired duty-cycle) bit number, needed to write it into the PWM duty-cycle register, represents
again a quantization noise source. Note that, unless a very high clock to modulation frequency
ratio is available (see Section 2.2.2), the effective number of bits that might be used to represent
the duty-cycle is always going to be much smaller than the typical variable bit number (16 or 32).
erefore, output quantization is unavoidable. e most unpleasing effect of output quantization
may be the occurrence of a peculiar type of instability, specific of digital control loops, that is
known as Limit Cycle Oscillation (LCO).

content: 相反，输出量化与数字到模拟转换中固有的截断（或舍入）操作有关，该操作将控制算法输出变量从数字域带回到连续时间域。在我们的应用案例中，该功能实际上是由数字PWM（DPWM）处理过程固有的。将控制变量输出（在我们的情况下是所需的占空比）位数减少，以写入PWM占空比寄存器，再次表示量化噪声源。请注意，除非有非常高的时钟到调制频率比可用（见第2.2.2节），用于表示占空比的有效位数始终比典型变量位数（16或32）要小得多。因此，输出量化是不可避免的。输出量化最令人不快的影响可能是出现特定于数字控制环的一种特殊不稳定性，即所谓的极限循环振荡（LCO）。

To open just a brief discussion of LCOs, we would like to show, in the first place, how a limit
cycle can be generated in a very simple situation. e case is depicted in Fig. 3.5. We may figure
variable d is the duty-cycle of a switching converter, like the one considered in our discussion,
whose desired set-point is the particular value we need to apply to bring the converter to the
steady state. Variable x may be associated, for example, to the converter average output current.
Unfortunately, as we see from Fig. 3.5, the desired set-point for d is not anyone of the possible
outputs, because of output quantization.

content: 为了简要讨论LCO，我们首先想要展示在一个非常简单的情况下如何产生极限循环振荡。如图3.5所示的情况是我们所讨论的开关转换器的占空比变量d，其期望设定点是我们需要应用的特定值，将转换器带到稳态。变量x可以与转换器的平均输出电流相关联，例如。不幸的是，如图3.5所示，由于输出量化，d的期望设定点不是可能的任何一个输出。

As a result, we will in any case apply either a bigger than needed duty-cycle, causing the
current increase beyond the steady-state level, or a lower than needed duty-cycle, causing the
current decrease below the steady-state value. is happens because the converter output current
is, to a first approximation, proportional to the integral of the inverter average output voltage, that
is in turn, proportional to the duty-cycle. Commutations between the two states are determined
by the current controller, that reacts to the current error build-up by changing the duty-cycle.
is results in a persistent oscillation, i.e., a limit cycle, of the control variables, that is
not due to any system instability, but only to the presence of the output quantization. Of course,
the amplitude and frequency of the limit cycle are largely dependent on several controller and
converter parameters like, for example, controller bandwidth, open loop system time constants
and open loop system static gain. Please note that, in cases like the half-bridge converter we
are considering here, where the input to output converter transfer function presents a low-pass
behavior well approximated by an integral action, this type of limit cycle is practically unavoidable.

moves.text_span: em instability, but only to the presence of the output quantizat

content: 因此，在任何情况下，我们都会应用大于所需的占空比，导致电流增加超过稳态水平，或应用小于所需的占空比，导致电流降低到低于稳态值。这是因为转换器输出电流在一定程度上与反相器平均输出电压的积分成正比，而后者又与占空比成正比。两个状态之间的换向由电流控制器确定，它通过改变占空比来响应电流误差的积累。这导致了控制变量的持续振荡，即极限循环，不是由于任何系统不稳定性引起的，而仅仅是由于
